data.title: End-to-End Encryption
data.description: Protects data communication from user devices to Netflix servers.
data.technical_spec: Employs HTTPS/SSL across all data exchanges.

data.title: Content Protection
data.description: Prevents unauthorized copying and distribution of digital media.
data.technical_spec: Utilizes DRM technologies such as PlayReady, Widevine, and FairPlay.

data.title: Identity and Access Management
data.description: Ensures secure and authorized access to user accounts.
data.technical_spec: Two-factor authentication and continual login session monitoring.

data.title: Threat Detection
data.technical_spec: Employs machine learning algorithms to detect anomalies in traffic patterns.

data.title: Security Incident Response
data.description: Improves recovery time in the event of a security breach.
data.technical_spec: Integrates cloud-native monitoring tools and automated response protocols.
